689252112.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contributions WHERE (status_geom_type).geom_type = 'LineString' AND (tags ? $1 OR tags @> $2) AND NOT (tags @> $3 OR tags @> $4 OR (tags @> $5 AND tags @> $6) OR tags @> $7 OR tags @> $8)
